summary: This standard translates an [RFC 3986](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc3986) URI like `web3://uniswap.eth/` to an EVM message such as: ``` EVMMessage { To: 0xaabbccddee.... // where uniswap.eth's address registered at ENS Calldata: 0x ... } ``` ⚠️ This proposal updates [ERC-4804](./eip-4804.md) with minor corrections, clarifications and modifications.
title: Web3 URL to EVM Call Message Translation
